title: Demo Time Gallery Snippet
description: Schema for a community snippet in the Demo Time Snippets Gallery

id.description: Unique identifier for the snippet. Must match the file path relative to the gallery/ folder, without the .json extension (e.g. 'setup/presentation-mode').

description.description: A clear explanation of what the snippet does and when to use it.
examples: Prepares VS Code for presenting by enabling Caffeine, hiding the menubar, and entering full screen.

author.description: GitHub username of the snippet author.

tags.description: List of tags used for filtering in the gallery panel. Use lowercase, short, descriptive words.

fields.description: Defines the arguments the snippet accepts via the args property. Each field maps to a {PLACEHOLDER} used in the steps. Can be empty if the snippet has no placeholders.

name.description: The placeholder name as used in steps, written in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (without curly braces).

description.description: A short explanation of what value this field expects.
examples: Relative path to the file to insert content into

type.description: The expected value type for this field.

required.description: Whether this field must be provided by the user. Required fields must not have a default value.

default.description: Default value used when the user does not provide one. Only allowed when required is false.

steps.description: The Demo Time steps this snippet executes. Placeholders written as {FIELD_NAME} will be replaced with the values provided via args.

action.description: The Demo Time action to perform.
